parameters.content:
## QA-01: Daily Smoke Test

**Schedule:** Daily 06:00 SAST (04:00 UTC)

Tests all portal and landing page URLs for:
- HTTP 200 status
- Response time < 3s
- Expected content present
- No error pages

Alerts on any failure via email.
